# MeshCtx — llms.txt
# AI Agent accessibility for MeshCtx v2.9.4 documentation
# Last updated: 2026-05-15

## MeshCtx
MeshCtx is the world's first self-evolving AI agent platform with full-brain emulation (13 brain regions), code sandbox, project indexing, and Feishu notifications. Open-core: AGPLv3 framework + source-available brain algorithms.

## Core Features
- 🧠 Super Brain: 13 brain regions (Hippocampal Replay, Amygdala Salience, Default Mode Network, Thalamic Gate, Cerebellar Forward Model, Basal Ganglia, ACC, Mirror Neurons, Insula, STDP Learner, Emotional Consolidation, IIT Consciousness)
- 🖥️ Code Sandbox: Safe Python/Bash/JS execution with Docker isolation + subprocess fallback + SSE streaming
- 📂 Project Indexer: 15+ language symbol extraction, file change monitoring, /context command
- 📨 Feishu Notifier: Card/text/deploy notifications with HMAC signature
- 🔍 Web Search: /search command via DuckDuckGo API
- 📄 Local File Access: /read /ls commands with WSL path translation
- 🧠 Hierarchical Memory (L0-L4) with Ebbinghaus Forgetting Curve
- 🔄 Meta-Cognition: evaluate → extract → update → adjust
- 🎭 Multi-Agent Orchestra with DAG decomposition
- 🔌 Plugin Marketplace: 8 plugins (3 builtin + 5 community)
- 🌐 7-language i18n (EN/ZH/JA/KO/FR/DE/ES)
- 💻 Windows/Linux cross-platform (macOS pending)

## Quick Links
- Homepage: https://meshctx.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/LucyAndLuna2023/meshctx
- API Docs: https://meshctx.com/docs (Swagger at /docs when running)
- Download: https://meshctx.com/#download
- Setup: /ui/setup | Chat: /ui/chat | Desktop: /ui/desktop

## Installation
- Windows: meshctx-setup-v2.9.0.exe from GitHub Releases
- Linux: git clone + python3 -m venv .venv + pip install -e .
- Start: mesctx start (Web) | mesctx desktop (Native window)

## API Endpoints (v2.9)
### System
- GET /api/system/summary — System overview
- GET /health — Health check

### Chat & Agent
- POST /api/chat — Chat completion
- POST /api/chat/stream — Streaming chat (SSE)
- POST /api/chat/upload — Upload file context
- POST /agent/start | /agent/stop — Agent loop control

### Sandbox (v2.7+)
- POST /api/sandbox/execute — Execute code (Python/Bash/JS)
- POST /api/sandbox/execute/stream — Streaming SSE execution

### Project Indexer (v2.7+)
- GET /api/project/index — Index status & stats
- GET /api/project/search?q= — Search project files
- GET /api/project/context?q= — Get code context for LLM

### Feishu (v2.8+)
- POST /api/feishu/test — Test webhook connection
- POST /api/feishu/notify — Send notification (text/card/deploy)

### Web Search (v2.7+)
- GET /api/search?q= — DuckDuckGo web search

### File Access (v2.2+)
- GET /api/file/read?path= — Read local file
- GET /api/file/list?path= — List directory

### Models
- GET /api/models — List all
- POST /api/models — Add | PUT /api/models/{id} — Update
- DELETE /api/models/{id} — Delete
- POST /api/models/{id}/test — Test connection

### Plugins (v2.1+)
- GET /api/plugins — List all (8 plugins)
- GET /api/plugins/{name} — Plugin detail
- POST /api/plugins/install/{name} — Install/activate
- POST /api/plugins/uninstall/{name} — Uninstall

### Brain Monitor
- GET /api/brain/status — 13-region brain status

## Project Structure
- src/core/ — Core engine (sandbox, project_indexer, feishu_notify, super_brain, brain_router, free_energy, active_inference, global_workspace, homeostasis, metacognition, hybrid_reasoning)
- src/web_ui.py — Web UI + Desktop Dashboard (Jinja2 templates)
- src/main.py — FastAPI app (15+ endpoint groups)
- plugins/ — Plugin registry + manifests (8 plugins)
- tests/ — 673 tests, all passing
- docs/ — GitHub Pages deployment (meshctx.com)

## Chat Commands
- /read <path> — Read local file
- /ls <path> — List directory
- /search <query> — Web search
- /run [python|bash|js] <code> — Execute in sandbox
- /context <query> — Search project codebase

## Optional
- License: AGPLv3 (framework) + Commercial (brain algorithms) — license@meshctx.com
- Benchmark: tests/benchmark_v19.py (76/100 Super Brain score)
